steps.narration: This site gives you unlimited 4K b-roll — completely free.
It's Pexels. Hundreds of thousands of pro clips, no watermark, no credit card, no catch. Type what you need — city night aerial.
And boom — instant drone-grade footage that most creators pay hundreds of dollars for. Every single clip here is free to download.
One click and it's yours in full 4K — fully licensed for client work, YouTube, ads, whatever you're building. No invoice ever shows up.
Follow MOTO NEWS — daily AI that actually matters.
